name: Zoomcar Holdings, Inc.
summary: Zoomcar Holdings, Inc. operates a peer-to-peer car sharing marketplace platform targeting emerging markets, connecting vehicle owners (Hosts) with individuals seeking short and medium-term vehicle rentals (Guests). The company facilitates vehicle bookings through a scalable digital platform, primarily operating in India via its subsidiary Zoomcar India Private Limited. Zoomcar completed a Business Combination with IOAC (Innovative International Acquisition Corp) on December 28, 2023, becoming a publicly traded Delaware corporation.

products.name: Zoomcar Peer-to-Peer Car Sharing Platform
products.description: Digital marketplace connecting vehicle owners (Hosts) with individuals (Guests) seeking short and medium-term vehicle rentals in emerging markets.
